name: task-manager-pro
description: A professional task management application with projects, boards, tasks, comments, and team collaboration.

features.description: Email + password login, JWT tokens, password reset via email
Create/manage projects with name, description, members, and settings
Kanban boards with customizable columns (To Do, In Progress, Done, etc.)
CRUD tasks with title, description, assignee, due date, priority, labels, attachments
Thread comments on tasks with @mentions and markdown support
In-app and email notifications for mentions, assignments, due dates
Invite members, assign roles (admin, member, viewer), manage permissions
Track all changes to tasks and projects with timestamps and authors
